candidates.title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 as a cheaper way to run agents
candidates.summary: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 brings stronger agentic capabilities, lower pricing, and improved safety, positioning the model as a cheaper alternative to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro.

candidates.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 on AWS: Anthropic’s most capable Sonnet model
candidates.summary: Today, we’re excited to announce the availability of Anthropic’s most advanced Sonnet model, Claude Sonnet 5, on Amazon Bedrock and Claude Platform on AWS. Claude Sonnet 5 is the first Sonnet model of Anthropic’s latest generation and represents a meaningful step forward. It delivers top-tier intelligence at Sonnet pricing for coding, agents, and everyday professional […]

candidates.title: Anthropic’s Claude Science bets on workflow, not a new model, to win over scientists
candidates.summary: Anthropic's Claude Science is a workbench that gives scientists one environment to do computational research, saving them from the need to bounce between databases, pipelines, and tools.

candidates.title: Build generative UI for AI agents on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore with the AG-UI protocol
candidates.summary: This post walks through how AG-UI integrates into the Fullstack AgentCore Solution Template (FAST) to build interactive agent frontends on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore. We then show how CopilotKit extends this with generative UI, shared state, and human-in-the-loop interactions, all deployed on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore.
